company_profiles.summary: Samsung is a leading manufacturer of high-bandwidth memory (HBM) and is actively involved in the development of Processing-in-Memory (PIM) technologies.
company_profiles.notes: Samsung's focus on HBM4 is driven by the increasing demand from AI applications.

company_profiles.summary: SK Hynix is collaborating with Dell to produce new flash memory chips, which may impact their HBM production capabilities.
company_profiles.notes: The collaboration is still in early stages, and its impact on HBM production is uncertain.

company_profiles.summary: Micron is exploring Processing-in-Memory (PIM) architectures to enhance energy efficiency in AI applications.
company_profiles.notes: The adoption of PIM is still in research phases, and practical implementations may take time.
